name: Fen Caldra
excerpt: Fen Caldra is a careful and discreet private transport operator in Tiveck.
notes: Fen Caldra, in his mid-40s, was born in Tiveck and has spent his life near the waterfront. He operates a private transport service with two vessels and a trusted crew. Known for reliability and discretion, he runs cargo through the Salt Warren, a network of tidal caves used for gray-market storage. Fen discovered the Sunken Ledger six years ago and keeps it hidden. He has leverage over Orris Vane with a forged customs document and finds Maren Ashveil intriguing, suspecting she seeks the Ledger.
